    • models/Notes
    • Note_TextBlock

    Type Alias Note_TextBlock

    A text block module of a note. Mirrors the backend TextblockResponse.

    type Note_TextBlock = {
        codeLanguage?: string;
        content?: string;
        createdAt: string;
        id: string;
        isCollapsed: boolean;
        name?: string;
        noteID: string;
        notePos: number;
        type: NoteBlockType;
        updatedAt: string;
    }
    • Defined in models/Notes.ts:61
    Index

    codeLanguage?: string
